clips.title: The Spell
clips.prompt: Fantasy style, enchanted grade. A dim stone chamber at night. A person cups their hands around a swirling orb of glowing magical light, wonder on their face, sparks drifting up, the glow lighting their features. A person in a fantasy cloak. Warm magical glow, drifting sparks, magical mood, 85mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Glade
clips.prompt: Fantasy style, enchanted grade. An enchanted forest glade at night, glowing floating wisps of light drifting between ancient trees, luminous mushrooms. A person stands in wonder among the floating lights, enchanted. A person in a traveler's cloak. Soft magical glow, floating wisps, magical mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Treasure
clips.prompt: Fantasy style, enchanted grade. A dim cavern. A person opens an ornate chest and warm golden magical light pours out, streaming up over their awestruck face, motes of light rising. A person in adventurer's garb. Warm golden magical glow, rising light, magical mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Swarm
clips.prompt: Fantasy style, enchanted grade. A twilight meadow. A person stands surrounded by a swirling swarm of glowing fireflies and magical sparks, delight on their face, arms slightly raised as the lights dance around them. A person in flowing clothes. Soft magical glow, swirling sparks, magical mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Library
clips.prompt: Fantasy style, enchanted grade. A grand wizard's library, towering shelves, books and glowing runes floating gently through the air, warm candlelight. A person stands in wonder as luminous books drift around them, enchanted. A person in scholar's robes. Warm magical glow, floating books, magical mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Conjuring
clips.prompt: Fantasy style, enchanted grade. A snowy forest clearing at night, soft falling snow. A person raises a hand and conjures a swirl of glowing magical light and drifting sparks above their palm, snow glittering in the glow, wonder on their face. A person in a winter cloak. Cool blue night with warm magic glow, magical mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
